scheme_name: Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)
page_title: Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)

details: The "Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)" was launched by the Animal and Fisheries Resources Department, Government of Bihar. This scheme aims to support fish farmers from Scheduled Castes, Tribes, and Extremely Backward Classes by providing financial and technical assistance for pond construction, installation of necessary equipment, and other related activities. The scheme has a total budget of ₹2994.60 lakh and seeks to enhance livelihood opportunities, ensure food and protein security, and promote employment among these communities.
benefits: Offers a 70% subsidy on the total cost, reducing the financial burden on beneficiaries.
Subsidy payments are made in two installments: 60% after pond construction and 40% after installation of related units and purchase of inputs.
eligibility: The applicant should belong to Scheduled Castes, Tribes, or Most Backward Classes.
The applicant should have private or leased land available for pond construction.

online: and clicks the "Applications are being invited for all the schemes of the financial year (2024-25),
to apply. Apply online for Training and Tour Darshan Scheme."
Select the category: Individual and complete all basic details of the applicant for registration, including category, caste, applicant name, date of birth, address, bank details, etc.
Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number and click to send OTP.
An OTP will be sent to the provided mobile number.
Enter the OTP; after verification of the OTP, you will receive a Registration Number and Password.
Click on the "Login" and enter the Registration Number and Password.
: Select "Application for fishery scheme" option and choose the scheme name "Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)", after the application form is open.
The application form will capture registration personal data details.
Fill in the bank and land details.
Click on the submit button as well print the application form and submit it to the District Fisheries Office along with attachments.

documents_required: Bank details (branch name, account number, IFSC code).
Aadhar Card, Ration Card, Voter ID.
Land Ownership Certificate/Revenue Receipt (for private land).
Registered Lease Agreement/Non-judicial Stamp Agreement (for lease land).
Notarized Affidavit Confirming the land is dispute-free.

faqs.question: What is the total budget of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The total budget of the scheme is ₹2994.60 lakh.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided per acre?
faqs.answer: A maximum of ₹10,10,000/- per acre is provided for pond construction and related units.

faqs.question: What is the minimum assistance provided per unit?
faqs.answer: A minimum of ₹6,20,000/- is provided per unit (0.5 acre).

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Indian nationals from Scheduled Castes, Tribes, or Most Backward Classes with private or lease land are eligible.

faqs.question: How is the subsidy paid?
faqs.answer: The subsidy is paid in two installments: 60% after pond construction and 40% after installation of related units and purchase of inputs.

faqs.question: How are beneficiaries selected?
faqs.answer: Beneficiaries are selected based on the scrutiny of applications by a committee headed by the Deputy Fisheries Director.

faqs.question: Is there a waiting list for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, a waiting list is prepared if the number of eligible applications exceeds the target.

faqs.question: Can applicants apply for more than one acre of land?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme limits assistance to a maximum of one acre per person/family.

faqs.question: What happens if there are errors in the application?
faqs.answer: Applicants will be given time to rectify errors. Applications without errors will be considered for selection.

faqs.question: What is the benefit of the package assistance?
faqs.answer: It provides a solid foundation for pond fisheries, increases fish product diversity, ensures sustainable income and employment, and promotes climate-friendly fisheries.

faqs.question: Can the subsidy be used for ponds less than 0.5 acre?
faqs.answer: No, the subsidy is not provided for ponds less than 0.5 acre.

faqs.question: What facilities are included in the package assistance?
faqs.answer: Facilities include the construction of rearing ponds, installation of tube wells and pumps, mechanical aerators, improved inputs, and shed construction.

faqs.question: Is there any priority for applications submitted early?
faqs.answer: Yes, priority is given to applicants who submit complete and error-free applications first.

faqs.question: Can applicants use bank loans to cover additional costs?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants can use bank loans to cover any costs exceeding the scheme's assistance limit.
